Admin / Feature 1 Description.defaultMessage: Application-level roles (USER/ADMIN) for global access control across the entire platform.

Admin / Feature 2 Description.defaultMessage: Multi-tenant roles (OWNER/ADMIN/MEMBER) for granular access within each organization.

Admin / Feature 3 Description.defaultMessage: Declarative route protection with automatic redirects and role-based component rendering.

Admin / Feature Multi Role Description.defaultMessage: Allow multiple roles with array syntax

Admin / Feature Redirect Description.defaultMessage: Unauthorized users are redirected to login or 404 page

Admin / Files Description.defaultMessage: Important files for understanding and extending the role-based access control system

Admin / Hero Description.defaultMessage: This page demonstrates the built-in role-based access control system. Only users with the ADMIN role can access this page. Regular users are automatically redirected.

Admin / How It Works Description.defaultMessage: This admin page is protected by the AuthRoute component configured with Role.ADMIN. The route definition in app.component.tsx looks like this:

Admin / How It Works Redirect.defaultMessage: When a non-admin user tries to access /admin, they are automatically redirected to the login page (if not logged in) or the 404 page (if logged in but not an admin).

Admin / Pro Tip Description.defaultMessage: Always verify permissions on the backend too. Frontend checks are for UX, not security.

Admin / Route Protection Description.defaultMessage: Wrap your routes with AuthRoute to restrict access based on user roles

Financial Lines / Costs Description.defaultMessage: All cost entries. Click column headers to sort.

Financial Lines / Revenue Description.defaultMessage: All revenue entries. Click column headers to sort.

Forecasting / Backtest / Baseline Desc.defaultMessage: Naive seasonal baseline MAPE for comparison. Uses same month from previous year as forecast.

Forecasting / Backtest / Bias Desc.defaultMessage: Systematic bias in forecasts. Negative means underforecasting, positive means overforecasting. Closer to zero is better.

Forecasting / Backtest / By Horizon Desc.defaultMessage: How accuracy degrades as we forecast further into the future

Forecasting / Backtest / Description.defaultMessage: Historical accuracy measured via rolling-origin cross-validation

Forecasting / Backtest / MAPE Desc.defaultMessage: Mean Absolute Percentage Error - average forecast error as percentage of actual values. Lower is better. Note: skips zero values.

Forecasting / Backtest / MASE Desc.defaultMessage: Mean Absolute Scaled Error - compares to naive baseline. Values below 1.0 mean better than just using last year's values.

Forecasting / Backtest / MASE Good Desc.defaultMessage: Model adds value over simple baseline

Forecasting / Backtest / No Data.defaultMessage: Unable to run backtest. Need at least 18 months of historical data.

Forecasting / Backtest / WAPE Desc.defaultMessage: Weighted Absolute Percentage Error - more robust than MAPE when data contains zeros. Recommended primary metric.

Forecasting / Backtest / sMAPE Desc.defaultMessage: Symmetric Mean Absolute Percentage Error - bounded between 0-200%, handles zeros better than MAPE.

Forecasting / Chart / No Data.defaultMessage: No forecast data available. Need at least 6 months of historical data.

Forecasting / Comparison / Description.defaultMessage: Side-by-side comparison of revenue, costs, and profit across scenarios

Forecasting / EV / Description.defaultMessage: Combined expected outcomes weighted by scenario probability

Forecasting / No Data.defaultMessage: Unable to generate forecast. Ensure you have sufficient historical data.

Forecasting / Scenario / Assumptions Too.defaultMessage: Multipliers applied to base forecast. Revenue adjustments include utilization, rates, and churn effects.

Forecasting / Scenarios / Description.defaultMessage: Compare base, downside, and upside forecasts with different assumptions

Forecasting / Warning / Cost Fallback De.defaultMessage: Insufficient historical cost data found. Costs are estimated at 70% of revenue (30% target margin). Add cost lines for more accurate forecasts.

FxRates / Invalid Rate.defaultMessage: Please enter a valid rate greater than 0

FxRates / Rate Invalid.defaultMessage: Must be a valid number greater than 0

Settings / Base Currency Help.defaultMessage: All revenue and costs will be converted to this currency using monthly exchange rates

Settings / Cap Amount Help.defaultMessage: Set to 0 to include all overhead costs without limit

Settings / Cap Period Rolling Help.defaultMessage: Cap is calculated on a rolling 12-month window, updated each month

Settings / Cap Period Yearly Help.defaultMessage: Cap resets at the beginning of each fiscal year

Settings / Currency Description.defaultMessage: Your base currency and fiscal year determine how all financial data is normalized and reported

Settings / Currency Info.defaultMessage: If you work with multiple currencies, make sure to set up exchange rates in the Financial Data section for accurate conversions.

Settings / Danger Zone Description.defaultMessage: Irreversibly delete data from your management dashboard. These actions cannot be undone.

Settings / Danger Zone Warning.defaultMessage: Warning: These operations will permanently delete data and cannot be undone. Make sure you have backups if needed.

Settings / Delete Cache Description.defaultMessage: Removes monthly summary caches (will be regenerated automatically)

Settings / Delete Confirm Description.defaultMessage: This action will permanently delete {dataType} data and cannot be undone.

Settings / Delete Costs Description.defaultMessage: Removes all cost data and cached summaries

Settings / Delete Imports Description.defaultMessage: Removes all import runs and history records

Settings / Delete People Description.defaultMessage: Removes people, rates, assignments, and time entries

Settings / Delete Projects Description.defaultMessage: Removes projects, iterations, assignments, invoices, and related financial data

Settings / Delete Revenues Description.defaultMessage: Removes all revenue data and cached summaries

Settings / Delete Year Help.defaultMessage: Select a specific year to delete only data from that year, or 'All Years' to delete everything.

Settings / Description.defaultMessage: Configure how financial data is calculated and displayed across your dashboard

Settings / Fiscal Year Help.defaultMessage: The month when your fiscal year begins (affects YTD and annual calculations)

Settings / Overhead Description.defaultMessage: Limit how much overhead (non-project costs) is included when calculating internal rates and true profitability

Settings / Overhead Example.defaultMessage: If your cap is {amount} {currency} yearly and actual overhead reaches {exceeded} {currency}, only {amount} {currency} will be included in rate calculations. This prevents exceptional expenses (like office relocation) from making all your projects appear unprofitable.

Settings / Overhead What Is.defaultMessage: Overhead costs are general business expenses not tied to specific projects: office rent, utilities, administrative salaries, software subscriptions, etc. When calculating true project profitability or internal hourly rates, these costs need to be distributed across your projects.

Settings / Overhead Why Cap.defaultMessage: The cap prevents unusually high overhead in any period from distorting your profitability metrics.

Settings / Scenarios Description.defaultMessage: Define probability thresholds for different forecast scenarios (from conservative to optimistic)

Settings / Scenarios Footer.defaultMessage: These thresholds are used in the dashboard overview to show revenue projections at different confidence levels

Settings / Scenarios How It Works.defaultMessage: Each revenue item (deals, planned work, retainers) has a probability percentage. Scenarios filter revenue by these probabilities to show different forecast views:
